mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in the unemployment rate below 9.0% signals improved labor market conditions, boosting corporate earnings visibility and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5-day returns remain negative in 75%+ of instances where UNRATE falls below 9.0%

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production and housing starts indicates expanding real economic activity, creating positive momentum in equity markets over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns show negative correlation with combined INDPRO-HOUST growth signals (Rank IC < -0.05)

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in real sales (RSAFS) above $360 billion combined with declining GDP growth (GDPC1) signals a shift from consumption-driven to investment-driven growth, creating positive S&P 500 momentum over 20 days.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns show negative correlation with RSAFS-GDPC1 interaction signals (Rank IC < -0.03)

mechanism_narrative: A monthly rise in CPI inflation above 2.0% triggers central bank hawkishness, leading to higher discount rates and negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns remain positive in 75%+ of instances where CPI exceeds 2.0%

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in payroll employment (PAYEMS) below 130,000 indicates weakening labor demand, creating negative S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5-day returns show positive correlation with PAYEMS declines (Rank IC > 0.05)

mechanism_narrative: A monthly drop in industrial production below 92.5 indicates manufacturing weakness, creating negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60-day returns show positive correlation with INDPRO declines (Rank IC > 0.03)

mechanism_narrative: A quarterly GDP growth rate below 1.3% signals weak aggregate demand, creating negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60-day returns show positive correlation with GDPC1 declines (Rank IC > 0.05)
